code:
%%{HealthTech_EMR_Sync}}}%%
stateDiagram-v2
    [HealthTech_EMR_Sync] --> Forming: TeamCreatedEvent
    Forming --> Active: TeamActivatedEvent
    Active --> Archived: TeamArchivedEvent
    Archived --> Active: TeamRestoredEvent
    Active --> Deleted: TeamDeletedEvent
    Archived --> Deleted: TeamDeletedEvent
    
    %% State styling with classes
    classDef formingState fill:#F39C12,stroke:#ecf0f1,color:black
    classDef activeState fill:#27AE60,stroke:#ecf0f1,color:black
    classDef archivedState fill:#7F8C8D,stroke:#ecf0f1,color:white
    classDef deletedState fill:#C0392B,stroke:#ecf0f1,color:white
    
    class Forming formingState
    class Active activeState
    class Archived archivedState
    class Deleted deletedState
    
    %% Notes
    note right of Forming
        Team is being set up
        Members can be added but team is not fully operational
    end note
    
    note right of Active
        Team is active and can be used by members
        Members can create content and collaborate
    end note
    
    note right of Archived
        Team is archived and read-only
        No new content can be created
        Can be restored at any time
    end note
    
    note right of Deleted
        Team has been permanently deleted
        Cannot be recovered
        All associated data is soft-deleted
    end note

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要为HealthTech EMR Sync系统设计一个团队生命周期状态图。核心状态包括：Forming（组建中）、Active（活跃）、Archived（已归档）和Deleted（已删除）。从Forming开始，团队创建后进入组建阶段。
明白。组建中的团队可以添加成员但还不能完全运作，对吧？那从Forming到Active的触发条件是什么？
对，成员可以加入但不能创建内容。激活条件是TeamActivatedEvent。另外，Active团队可以被归档或删除，Archived团队可以恢复回Active，也可以直接删除。
好的，我已经画出了四个状态节点和它们之间的转换关系。现在我想给每个状态加上视觉区分——Forming用橙色，Active用绿色，Archived用灰色，Deleted用红色，这样运维人员一眼就能识别团队状态。
颜色方案可以，但注意Archived和Deleted的文字要用白色，背景色较深。另外每个状态右侧需要加注释说明：Forming要强调"成员可加入但团队未完全运作"；Active要说明"成员可创建内容并协作"；Archived是只读状态，可随时恢复；Deleted是永久删除，所有关联数据软删除且不可恢复。
确认一下：Archived状态禁止创建新内容但可以恢复，Deleted状态完全不可恢复，数据是软删除而非物理删除。注释我都放在各状态右侧。
等等，Archived的注释里"Can be restored at any time"容易误解为自动恢复，应该明确是"可由管理员手动恢复"。还有，Deleted的注释"Cannot be recovered"和"soft-deleted"放在一起有点矛盾，需要说明是逻辑删除、物理不可恢复。
已调整注释表述：Archived注明"可由管理员随时手动恢复"，Deleted注明"逻辑层面永久删除，不可恢复，关联数据标记为软删除"。状态图现在完整了，包含所有状态转换、视觉样式和右侧说明注释。
